name: Kingsoft Cloud
description: Kingsofts public cloud (金山云) offering compute, object storage, CDN, databases and AI services. NYSE/HKEX listed.

seo.title: Kingsoft Cloud — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Kingsoft Cloud: Kingsofts public cloud (金山云) offering compute, object storage, CDN, databases and AI services. NYSE/HKEX listed.

when_to_use: Chinese public cloud with compute, storage, and CDN services
AI and video cloud services for Chinese media companies
Object storage and databases for Kingsoft ecosystem products
NYSE-listed alternative cloud for China-market tech companies
Managed Kubernetes and GPU compute for Chinese AI startups

cons: Smaller service catalog vs top three
review.verdict: A tier-two Chinese cloud with fair pricing, but you'd pick Alibaba or Tencent for serious scale.
review.best_for: Chinese SMBs needing affordable compute, CDN, and object storage
review.not_for: Global companies or teams needing cutting-edge AI and serverless services
